text: You are probably safe to build your own software, but come back here if your situation changes.

You're in that tricky place where it's not obvious which route to go down. You might want to try building a proof of concept at the same time as looking for possible commercial or open-source solutions. Get in touch if you need some help doing either of these.
It's probably best if you find some existing software that does what you need. Get in touch if you need help to define your requirements and search for possible solutions.
